extension.description: Easily switch Claude models by managing .claude/settings.local.json
view.profiles.name: Model Profiles
view.profiles.welcome:
No model profiles. [Add Profile](command:claude-model-switch.addProfile)

You can also [Import Profiles](command:claude-model-switch.importProfiles) from a JSON file.
